articles.title: Winner of Beijing robot half-marathon smashes human world record by 6 minutes
articles.description: The winner of a robot half-marathon held in Beijing on Sunday smashed the human world record by more than six minutes in the latest display of the industry’s rapid development. articles.title: AI is not eating up China’s software market but turbocharging it: HSBC analyst

articles.title: Tesla brings its robotaxi service to Dallas and Houston
articles.description: The company now offers robotaxi service in three cities, all of them in Texas, after launching in Austin last year and starting to offer rides without safety drivers in January 2026.
